The ***Journal of Youth Studies*** is a [peer-reviewed](/wiki/Peer-review "Peer-review") [academic journal](/wiki/Academic_journal "Academic journal") covering [youth studies](/wiki/Youth_studies "Youth studies"). It was established in 1998 and is published ten times per year by [Taylor & Francis](/wiki/Taylor_%26_Francis "Taylor & Francis"). The [editors-in-chief](/wiki/Editors-in-chief "Editors-in-chief") are Robert MacDonald ([Monash University](/wiki/Monash_University "Monash University")), Tracy Shildrick ([Newcastle University](/wiki/Newcastle_University "Newcastle University")), and Dan Woodman ([University of Melbourne](/wiki/University_of_Melbourne "University of Melbourne")). According to the *[Journal Citation Reports](/wiki/Journal_Citation_Reports "Journal Citation Reports")*, the journal has a 2017 [impact factor](/wiki/Impact_factor "Impact factor") of 1.724, ranking it 26th out of 98 journals in the category "Social Sciences, Interdisciplinary".[[1]](#cite_note-WoS-1)
